Feature Matrix

This page exercises every GFM construct at once so the converter's table, list, blockquote, code, emphasis, strikethrough and rule handling can all be asserted from a single realistic document with plenty of surrounding prose.

FeatureStatusSince
TablesStable1.0
StrikethroughStable1.1
Task listsBeta1.2

Notes

  • Top-level item one
    • nested item a
    • nested item b
  • Top-level item two

Design for the common case; make the rare case possible.

Inline code like convert(html) stays inline, while strong and emphasis keep their delimiters and deprecated wording is struck through.

Everything after the rule is a separate section of prose that continues the document so the horizontal rule sits between two real blocks of content.
